name: Mozambique
experiences: Ilha de Moçambique UNESCO fort and Swahili-Portuguese lanes
avoid: December to March is hotter, wetter, and the cyclone-risk window on the coast, so dhows, diving, and rough coastal roads get less reliable.
Chapa minibuses are cheap but cramped and slow with luggage, especially on the long Tofo-Vilankulo and Beira-Gorongosa stretches.
Some domestic routes do not run daily, so lock LAM flights before confirming lodge nights in Vilankulo, Gorongosa, or Nampula.
stopoverNote: If you only have 7-8 days, fly open-jaw via Maputo and Nampula, keep just Tofo + Vilankulo or Gorongosa + Ilha de Moçambique, and skip the longest overland transfers.

cities.name: Maputo
cities.notes: The capital is the easiest gateway for FEIMA crafts, seafood restaurants, the ironwork railway station, and a first taste of Mozambique's Portuguese-Indian Ocean mix.

cities.name: Tofo Beach
cities.notes: Tofo is the laid-back Inhambane coast base for whale shark ocean safaris, Tofinho surf viewpoints, and barefoot seafood dinners.

cities.name: Vilankulo
cities.notes: Vilankulo is the mainland launchpad for the Bazaruto Archipelago, with dhow trips, reef snorkeling, and long tidal sandbars.

cities.name: Gorongosa National Park
cities.notes: Mozambique's headline safari park combines floodplains, lion and wild dog sightings, community projects, and the Chitengo wildlife hub.

cities.name: Ilha de Moçambique
cities.notes: This UNESCO island layers Swahili, Arab, and Portuguese history with coral-stone mansions, Fort São Sebastião, and dhow-dotted sea views.

itinerary.sim: Vodacom M-Pesa and Movitel are the easiest airport SIM picks; budget about ₹700–₹1,600 for enough data for maps, WhatsApp, and booking confirmations, with the strongest coverage in Maputo and patchier signal once you push north of Vilankulo.

Maputo.name: Maputo
Maputo.note: Use Maputo as the soft landing for cash, SIM, and seafood before heading north by LAM or by road.

days.theme: Historic core, station architecture, and a relaxed first evening by the bay

activities.name: Fortress of Maputo admission
activities.tip: Foreigner tickets are usually around MZN 200 and are best paid in small cash at the gate.

activities.name: Maputo Railway Station and Praça dos Trabalhadores walk
Central Market and FEIMA craft market browse
Tunduru Botanical Gardens sunset stop
Airport or city taxi within central Maputo

days.theme: Museums, bay crossings, and one more city day before the coast

activities.name: Museu de História Natural admission
Catembe ferry round-trip across Maputo Bay
Costa do Sol promenade or beach stop
LAM Mozambique flight Maputo-Inhambane or Maputo-Vilankulo
activities.tip: Book domestic sectors early because some coastal routes do not run daily in the low season.

Tofo Beach.name: Tofo Beach
Tofo Beach.note: Tofo works best as a two-night barefoot beach stop where one morning is reserved for ocean conditions and whale shark luck.

days.theme: Beach reset, dune viewpoints, and an easy first night in Tofo

activities.name: Inhambane Airport transfer or chapa from Maxixe/Inhambane to Tofo
Praia do Tofo beach time
Tofinho viewpoint and surf beach walk
Surf lesson at Tofinho

days.theme: Whale shark ocean safari, reef time, and a proper Tofo seafood evening

activities.name: Peri-Peri Divers whale shark ocean safari / snorkeling trip
activities.tip: The current snorkel ocean safari is around MZN 3,600 and is the benchmark half-day whale shark trip in Tofo.

activities.name: Single dive with full equipment from Peri-Peri Divers or Liquid Dive Adventures
Massage or yoga session back near the beach lodges
Shared chapa or tuk-tuk rides around Tofo and Barra turnoff

Vilankulo.name: Vilankulo
Vilankulo.note: Vilankulo is worth the detour for one full archipelago day; the sandbars and dhows are the actual reason to stay here.

days.theme: Arrival in Vilankulo, dhow silhouettes, and a first low-tide beach evening

activities.name: LAM Mozambique flight Inhambane-Maputo-Vilankulo or shared road transfer
Vilankulo Beach walk and dhow harbor photography
Market stop for capulanas, cashews, and fresh fruit
Sunset dhow cruise from Vilankulo bay

days.theme: Bazaruto Archipelago dhow day with reef snorkeling and island time

activities.name: Traditional dhow safari to Magaruque or Bangue with lunch and snorkeling
activities.tip: Shared dhow day trips typically price in the USD 100-150 range in 2025, often with marine park fees and lunch bundled in.

activities.name: Bazaruto marine park fee if billed separately
Two Mile Reef snorkeling upgrade by speedboat operator
Tuk-tuk ride between lodges, market, and dhow beach

Gorongosa National Park.name: Gorongosa National Park
Gorongosa National Park.note: Give Gorongosa at least two nights so you can pair one classic game drive day with a slower community or walking add-on.

days.theme: Chitengo arrival, floodplain game drive, and the first safari sunset

activities.name: Road transfer from Beira or Chimoio into Gorongosa / Chitengo
Gorongosa National Park conservation fee
activities.tip: The current international adult park fee is USD 20 per day, separate from activities and accommodation.

activities.name: Shared afternoon game drive from Chitengo
Sundowner stop in the floodplain with guide

days.theme: Full safari day with birding, lion country, and a slower evening back at camp

activities.name: Sunrise game drive in the Rift Valley and Lake Urema zone
Walking safari or community visit add-on
Birding around Chitengo or Vinho pans
Bush breakfast or bush dinner add-on

Ilha de Moçambique.name: Ilha de Moçambique
Ilha de Moçambique.note: End here if you want a slower heritage finish; most sights are walkable once you arrive from Nampula by road.

days.theme: Stone Town lanes, museum fort walls, and a first evening over the sea

activities.name: Road transfer from Nampula Airport to Ilha de Moçambique
Fortaleza de São Sebastião and chapel admission
activities.tip: Foreign visitor entry is commonly reported around MZN 200, and bringing small metical notes makes the fort visit easier.

activities.name: Palácio de São Paulo Museum admission
Stone Town walking route via the old hospital, mosque quarter, and seafront

days.theme: Bridge-side life, dhow views, and a slower second heritage day

activities.name: Morning dhow or local boat cruise around the island shoreline
Museu de Arte Sacra admission
Cabaceira Pequena beach hop by tuk-tuk or taxi
Handmade jewelry and textile browse in the island lanes
